step_rationale: ADTRP effector regulating endocytic trafficking and monocyte adhesion; suppresses inflammatory cell recruitment.
mechanism: MIA3 downstream of ADTRP modulates leukocyte adhesion molecule trafficking and endothelial activation, reducing plaque inflammation.

references.title: Androgen inhibits key atherosclerotic processes by directly activating ADTRP transcription.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
